headline: Diamondback Energy Inc. (FANG) One of the Best Oil Stocks to Buy Amid US-Iran War that Citi is Bullish On
summary: Diamondback Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) is one of the best oil stocks to buy now amid the US-Iran Conflict. On May 20, analysts at Citi reiterated their Buy rating on Diamondback Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) and raised their price target to $245 from $225. The upgrade comes after Diamondback Energy rallied by more than 30% year to […]
